languages.text: "Чтобы убедить вас, мне придется совершить что-то невероятное, не так ли? Обыграть вас в регицид, например".

traits.locale_text: "Есть идея. Наверняка вы знаток игры в регицид, сыграем?"

languages.text: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."
languages.original_text: "Чтобы убедить вас, мне придется совершить что-то невероятное, не так ли? Обыграть вас в регицид, например".

traits.locale_text: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."
"To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."
"To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."

languages.text: “要让你信服，我得先露两手绝活，对吧？比如在弑君棋上赢你一局。”
languages.original_text: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."

traits.locale_text: “要让你信服，我得先露两手绝活，对吧？比如在弑君棋上赢你一局。”

languages.text: « Pour vous convaincre, il faudrait que je fasse quelque chose d'extraordinaire, n'est-ce pas ? Vous battre au régicide, par exemple. »
languages.original_text: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."

traits.locale_text: « Pour vous convaincre, il faudrait que je fasse quelque chose d'extraordinaire, n'est-ce pas ? Vous battre au régicide, par exemple. »

languages.text: "Seni ikna etmek için olağanüstü bir şey yapmam gerekiyor, değil mi? Mesela seni kral katilinde yensem nasıl olur?"
languages.original_text: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."

traits.locale_text: "Seni ikna etmek için olağanüstü bir şey yapmam gerekiyor, değil mi? Mesela seni kral katilinde yensem nasıl olur?"

languages.text: «Para convencerle, tendría que hacer algo extraordinario, ¿verdad? Como vencerle en una partida de regicidio, por ejemplo».
languages.original_text: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."

traits.locale_text: «Para convencerle, tendría que hacer algo extraordinario, ¿verdad? Como vencerle en una partida de regicidio, por ejemplo».

languages.text: "Ich müsste etwas Außergewöhnliches tun, um Euch zu überzeugen, oder? Euch in Königsmord schlagen zum Beispiel."
languages.original_text: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."

traits.locale_text: "Ich müsste etwas Außergewöhnliches tun, um Euch zu überzeugen, oder? Euch in Königsmord schlagen zum Beispiel."

languages.text: 「君を納得させるには、私にも何か特別なことをしなければならないだろう。例えば、君に王殺しで勝つことだ」
languages.original_text: "To convince you, I would have to do something extraordinary, wouldn't I? Like beat you at regicide, for instance."

traits.locale_text: 「君を納得させるには、私にも何か特別なことをしなければならないだろう。例えば、君に王殺しで勝つことだ」
